ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the website based on traffic or relevance */,
  "author_attributions" INTEGER /* Total number of author attributions on the website */,
  "page_author_attributions" INTEGER /* Total number of page author attributions on the website */,
  "site_author_attributions" INTEGER /* Total number of site author attributions */,
  "top_authored_webpage" TEXT /* Link to the top authored webpage associated with the artist */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name of the website */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the website is registered */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the website data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., content creator, editor) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the author was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the author's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_attributions" (
  "attribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribution record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the attribution is made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author being attributed */,
  "attribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the attribution */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, video) */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL of the specific content */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_attributions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_attributions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user visiting the page */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., organic, referral) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser and operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last date the user was active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "url_tracking" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the URL belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* The actual URL */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks received */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions served */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic (e.g., Google, Facebook) */,
  "campaign" TEXT /* Campaign associated with the URL */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_url_tracking_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "webpage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the metrics refer to */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the webpage being measured */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for the webpage */,
  "average_time_on_page" REAL /* Average time spent on the webpage */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Calculated engagement score based on various metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_webpage_metrics_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_calendar" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the content is scheduled */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the content is scheduled to be posted */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content to be posted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the scheduled content (e.g., planned, published) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the content */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL of the specific content */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_calendar_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_calendar_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., content creator, editor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the role's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
